title: 99acres Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: 99acres Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
